1.text: Uwah! I’m about to start a new school!!! I hope nobody bullies me like in my old school…. Gasp! Maybe I’ll even,....... find a girlfriend?!

2.text: You walk towards the school gate, and your eyes land on a very short and petite girl.

3.text: (Omg! She’s so kawaii!!! UWahhh, should I talk to her???)

4.text: Your eyes meet hers and she she smiles shyly back at you

5.text: Hey! You're on board cleaning duty today! Don't mess it up, or else I'l have to tell the teacher!

6.text:
(Omg, she's so fierce and sugoiii! I'm getting chills just listening to her! I feel so drawn...)
(Uwahhh... Who do I ask for directions??)

a.text: Compliment Kaicho-chans leadership skills and try to charm her with your incel skills!

b.text: Pet Uwa-chans ears and ask if she can show you to the classroom!

c.text: Ignore them and head to class.

7.text: Ohayo-desu! You looked so sugoii earlier when you were ordering them around! I-im just so shy around girls and they all seem to hate me for some reason, b-b-b-but I wanna try something different this year! Please hang out with me, and I’ll protect you! Senpai will protect you!

8.text: Konnichi-wassup! I know, I'm so cool like that! I'm the class president, so I have to lead everyone.

9.text: Sure, you can hang around me, but I don’t need your protection! Cmon, I’ll show you to your classroom cause I’m nice like that. Name’s Kaichoderukumachisendukasakura, but call me Kaicho!

10.text: Ohayo, name's Senpai! Saw you lurking around the blue-haired girl, and I thought your ears looked super PLUS ULTRA! Mind if I touch them? Wow, they're so soft and petite!

11.text: Uwahhhhh, Uwa-chan i-i-i-i-i-i-i-is s-s-s-s-so h-honored that Senpai w-w-wants to p-p-p-pet me! Super duper truper sugoiiii kawaiiiiii!!! Here, Uwa-chan will h-help you get to o-o-our classroom (≧ω≦)

12.text: You arrive at the classroom. \n You look around and see everyone sit amongst their friends. Everyone except for you.

13.text: Sigh.. I'm too dumb and stupid and ugly and nerdy and totally not attractive enough for them to talk to me!! Lets approach someone to talk about my favorite anime "Days with my Stepsister" to..!

a.text: Approach the sour-looking girl next to you.

15.text: You must be new. My name's Tsunakadere, but don't think that we're gonna ever become friends. I don't like you like that, so don't get the wrong message!

16.text: Konnichiwassup gng!! Heya Tsunakadere-chan, ya wouldnt mind lending me a pencil, would'ya?

17.text:
*blushes*
Y-yes of course, I'll give you one right away!! Do you need anything else, kaicho-san?? I'd do anything for you!! :3

18.text: *Raises eyebrow, “NANI?” Was that what I think it was!? C-could it be... IRL WAIFU YURI?!?!?"

a.text: Yo.. you wouldn't mind kissing in front of me right? Always been a dream of mine to see two beautiful ladies fight for my love..

19.text: SHUT YOUR YAPPERY AHH MOUTH UP I FREAKING HATE YOU!! YOUR'E AN INCEL AND A FREAK AND NOBODY LOVES YOU!!!

21.text: Why...? Why do all girls hate me no matter what I do? WHAT DID I DO TO DESERVE THIS??

22.text: Screw this. Scew it all. I shall never again be defiled by wordly filth. The only way to fill the newly formed hole in my heart is... ... ... REVENGE!

23.text: You reach into your bag and pull out a cold metal object... You pull the trigger and everything turns into a haze...

26.text: H-how did this happen?? I can't believe I did this! I'm doomed now! No girls will ever wanna go after a loser with bloodstained hands like me! Frick my stupid baka life theres no longer a point to living...

b.text: No! Theres so much ahead of me!

27.text: ..What did you just say..? How dare you.. How dare you speak such indecency.. in front of Kaicho-sama no less.. How dare you taint her innocence and purity and holyness..

28.text: Whaaat? What's wrong with a lil fun? Shouldn't a girl always follow her superior? Heh, you're probably just flustered..

29.text: ... You're fucking crazy. You have some big nuts, guy.

31.text: You watch Tsunakadere-chan reach for her bag and pull out a certain... sharp object. A knife.

32.text:
You aim the gun towards your own head, and everything turns to black.

[FIN]

33.text: Kaicho-sama, I'd do anything for you. I'd skin myself, and feed you my flesh. I'd carve my own heart out for you. I'd even kill this pathetic excuse of a human for you.. I love you Kaicho-sama..! Please accept this murder as an act of my devotion!

34.text: Before you could even let out a scream, you feel a sharp tug at your fat stomach rolls. You flop onto the ground.

35.text: As you lay on the cold hard floor, you watch Kaicho-chan and Tsukadere-chan share a passionate kiss. You close your eyes, and listen to the police siren fade into the background. [FIN]

36.text: U-u-uwahhhh!! Senpai decided to approach Uwa-chan?? W-w-w-w-what's the occasion for s-s-s-such a m-m-m-momentous occasion?

a.text: Compliment her unique way of speaking

37.text: *In a soft whisper* Y-your stutters are so cute... sweetie...
